title: Intensely Tangy American Purple Sprouting Broccoli Casserole
description: A dense and tangy American dish featuring purple sprouting broccoli, perfect for a crowd, with anti-inflammatory friendly properties.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
Bring a large pot of salted water to a boil and blanch the purple sprouting broccoli for 5 minutes.
Drain the broccoli and set it aside to cool.
In a large skillet, heat the olive oil over medium heat and saute the chopped onion until softened.
Add the minced garlic to the skillet and cook for an additional minute.
In a large bowl, whisk together the Greek yogurt, mayonnaise, lemon juice, salt, and black pepper.
Add the cooked broccoli, onion mixture, and shredded cheddar cheese to the bowl and stir until combined.
Transfer the mixture to a 9x13 inch baking dish and bake for 25 minutes.
Remove the casserole from the oven and let it cool for 10 minutes before serving.
